place.summary: Hong Kong International Airport functions primarily as a disperser in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong Disneyland. Visitors often continue to Hong Kong Disneyland.

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Hong Kong International Airport frequently appears alongside Hong Kong Disneyland, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: Strong onward link to Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Visitors often continue from Hong Kong International Airport to Hong Kong Disneyland, with relatively strong journey experience.

journey_examples.trajectory: Hong Kong Disneyland -> Hong Kong International Airport
